'''âp-g-d-y''' ('''kapagdeyoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:monster|monster]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-g-d-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:monster|monster]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âp-g-d-y
|-
! Lemma
| kapagdeyoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thipagdeyoko|thipagdeyoko]] || [[word:jipagdeyoko|jipagdeyoko]] || [[word:shipagdeyoko|shipagdeyoko]] || [[word:kipagdeyoko|kipagdeyoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthupagdeyoko|thuthupagdeyoko]] || [[word:jujupagdeyoko|jujupagdeyoko]] || [[word:shushupagdeyoko|shushupagdeyoko]] || [[word:kukupagdeyoko|kukupagdeyoko]]
|-

|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thupagdeyoko|thupagdeyoko]] || [[word:jupagdeyoko|jupagdeyoko]] || [[word:shupagdeyoko|shupagdeyoko]] || [[word:kupagdeyoko|kupagdeyoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thopagdeyoko|thopagdeyoko]] || [[word:jopagdeyoko|jopagdeyoko]] || [[word:shopagdeyoko|shopagdeyoko]] || [[word:kopagdeyoko|kopagdeyoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠpagdeyoko|thĂŠpagdeyoko]] || [[word:jĂŠpagdeyoko|jĂŠpagdeyoko]] || [[word:shĂŠpagdeyoko|shĂŠpagdeyoko]] || [[word:kĂŠpagdeyoko|kĂŠpagdeyoko]]
|-

|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thapagdeyoko|thapagdeyoko]] || [[word:japagdeyoko|japagdeyoko]] || [[word:shapagdeyoko|shapagdeyoko]] || [[word:kapagdeyoko|kapagdeyoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thapagdeyoko|thapagdeyoko]] || [[word:japagdeyoko|japagdeyoko]] || [[word:shapagdeyoko|shapagdeyoko]] || [[word:kapagdeyoko|kapagdeyoko]]

=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
